title: BattleBlocker
description: Blocks features while in a Cobblemon battle
body: # BattleBlocker A Fabric server-sided mod that provides customization to block features while a player is in a Cobblemon battle. ## Features - Block commands while in a battle ## Installation 1. Download the latest version of the mod from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/battleblocker). 2. Download all required dependencies: - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 3. Install the mod and dependencies into your server's `mods` folder. 4. Configure your blocks in the `./config/battleblocker/config.json` file. ## Commands/Permissions | Command | Description | Permission | |-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------| | /battleblocker reload | Reload the Mod | battleblocker.command.reload | | /battleblocker debug | Toggle the debug mode for more insight into errors | battleblocker.command.deug | | Permission | Description | |-------------------------------|-----------------------------------------| | battleblocker.bypass.commands | Permission to bypass the commands block | ## Planned Features - More blocked features? (please suggest) ## Donations This mod was developed as part of the Skies Development goal of **providing free, high quality, and open sourced mods** for the Cobblemon and Fabric communities! If you are able to support this mission, **please consider making a one-time donation or becoming a Member** on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/stampede2011). Being a member gives you early access to all new mods as well as helping decide on the development direction. ## Support A community support Discord has been opened up for all Skies Development related projects! Feel free to join and ask questions or leave suggestions :)
